productDisplayName: Nike Women Air Cardio Silver Sports Shoes
description: Work out at the gym, hit the aerobic floor or the dance floor in style with the nike Air Cardio III shoe. With optimal air cushioning comfort and a sleek, low profile silhouette, this pair is a great wear on casual days out as well.UpperSmooth, supple and flexible synthetic leather upper with perforations for enhanced breathabilitySynthetic leather overlays for added shoe structureMeshed and padded tongue and sockliner for all-day comfortLacing system for a snug, customised FitMidsoleFabric footbed for all-day breathable comfortAir unit under the heel for enhanced cushioningFull-length PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with flex grooves and diamond-shaped suction lugs for enhanced flexibility, grip and tractionScooped heel with visible air unit for maximum cushioned comfortshoe careRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
